0:
SELECT
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
  SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio_eur_to_czk
FROM customers	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1:
SELECT y.CustomerID
FROM yearmonth AS y
JOIN customers AS c ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM'
  AND y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
GROUP BY y.CustomerID
ORDER BY SUM(y.Consumption) ASC
LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
2:
SELECT AVG(y.Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
  AND y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
3:
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'CZK' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionDifference
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
4:
SELECT SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) AS Year
FROM yearmonth AS y
JOIN customers AS c ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4)
ORDER BY SUM(y.Consumption) DESC
LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
5:
SELECT SUBSTR(ym.Date,5,2) AS Month, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS ym
JOIN customers AS c ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
  AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY SUBSTR(ym.Date,5,2)
ORDER BY SUM(ym.Consumption) DESC
LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
6:
SELECT
  sme.annual_avg - lam.annual_avg AS diff_sme_lam,
  lam.annual_avg - kam.annual_avg AS diff_lam_kam,
  kam.annual_avg - sme.annual_avg AS diff_kam_sme
FROM
  (
    SELECT SUM(y.Consumption) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS annual_avg
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    JOIN (
      SELECT MIN(t.year_total) AS min_total
      FROM (
        SELECT y2.CustomerID, SUM(y2.Consumption) AS year_total
        FROM yearmonth y2
        JOIN customers c2 ON c2.CustomerID = y2.CustomerID
        WHERE y2.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
          AND c2.Currency = 'CZK'
          AND c2.Segment = 'SME'
        GROUP BY y2.CustomerID
      ) t
    ) m
    WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
      AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
      AND c.Segment = 'SME'
      AND y.CustomerID IN (
        SELECT t2.CustomerID
        FROM (
          SELECT y3.CustomerID, SUM(y3.Consumption) AS year_total
          FROM yearmonth y3
          JOIN customers c3 ON c3.CustomerID = y3.CustomerID
          WHERE y3.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
            AND c3.Currency = 'CZK'
            AND c3.Segment = 'SME'
          GROUP BY y3.CustomerID
        ) t2
        WHERE t2.year_total = m.min_total
      )
  ) AS sme
CROSS JOIN
  (
    SELECT SUM(y.Consumption) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS annual_avg
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    JOIN (
      SELECT MIN(t.year_total) AS min_total
      FROM (
        SELECT y2.CustomerID, SUM(y2.Consumption) AS year_total
        FROM yearmonth y2
        JOIN customers c2 ON c2.CustomerID = y2.CustomerID
        WHERE y2.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
          AND c2.Currency = 'CZK'
          AND c2.Segment = 'LAM'
        GROUP BY y2.CustomerID
      ) t
    ) m
    WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
      AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
      AND c.Segment = 'LAM'
      AND y.CustomerID IN (
        SELECT t2.CustomerID
        FROM (
          SELECT y3.CustomerID, SUM(y3.Consumption) AS year_total
          FROM yearmonth y3
          JOIN customers c3 ON c3.CustomerID = y3.CustomerID
          WHERE y3.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
            AND c3.Currency = 'CZK'
            AND c3.Segment = 'LAM'
          GROUP BY y3.CustomerID
        ) t2
        WHERE t2.year_total = m.min_total
      )
  ) AS lam
CROSS JOIN
  (
    SELECT SUM(y.Consumption) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS annual_avg
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    JOIN (
      SELECT MIN(t.year_total) AS min_total
      FROM (
        SELECT y2.CustomerID, SUM(y2.Consumption) AS year_total
        FROM yearmonth y2
        JOIN customers c2 ON c2.CustomerID = y2.CustomerID
        WHERE y2.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
          AND c2.Currency = 'CZK'
          AND c2.Segment = 'KAM'
        GROUP BY y2.CustomerID
      ) t
    ) m
    WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
      AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
      AND c.Segment = 'KAM'
      AND y.CustomerID IN (
        SELECT t2.CustomerID
        FROM (
          SELECT y3.CustomerID, SUM(y3.Consumption) AS year_total
          FROM yearmonth y3
          JOIN customers c3 ON c3.CustomerID = y3.CustomerID
          WHERE y3.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
            AND c3.Currency = 'CZK'
            AND c3.Segment = 'KAM'
          GROUP BY y3.CustomerID
        ) t2
        WHERE t2.year_total = m.min_total
      )
  ) AS kam	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT Segment,
       CASE
         WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL
         ELSE (
           (SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
            SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
           ) * 100.0 /
           SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
         )
       END AS PercentageIncrease
FROM yearmonth ym
JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
  AND c.Currency = 'EUR'
  AND SUBSTR(ym.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
GROUP BY c.Segment
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) > 0
  AND (
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL
      ELSE (
        (SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
         SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
        ) * 100.0 /
        SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
      )
    END
  ) IN (
    SELECT MAX(PercentageIncrease)
    FROM (
      SELECT c2.Segment AS Segment,
             CASE
               WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym2.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL
               ELSE (
                 (SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym2.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
                  SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym2.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
                 ) * 100.0 /
                 SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym2.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
               )
             END AS PercentageIncrease
      FROM yearmonth ym2
      JOIN customers c2 ON c2.CustomerID = ym2.CustomerID
      WHERE c2.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
        AND c2.Currency = 'EUR'
        AND SUBSTR(ym2.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
      GROUP BY c2.Segment
      HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym2.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) > 0
         AND SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym2.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) > 0
    )
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MIN(PercentageIncrease)
    FROM (
      SELECT c3.Segment AS Segment,
             CASE
               WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym3.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym3.Consumption ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL
               ELSE (
                 (SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym3.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym3.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
                  SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym3.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym3.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
                 ) * 100.0 /
                 SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym3.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym3.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
               )
             END AS PercentageIncrease
      FROM yearmonth ym3
      JOIN customers c3 ON c3.CustomerID = ym3.CustomerID
      WHERE c3.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
        AND c3.Currency = 'EUR'
        AND SUBSTR(ym3.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
      GROUP BY c3.Segment
      HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym3.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym3.Consumption ELSE 0 END) > 0
         AND SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym3.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym3.Consumption ELSE 0 END) > 0
    )
  )	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
8:
SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth
WHERE CustomerID = 6
  AND Date BETWEEN '201308' AND '201311'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
9:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'CZE' AND Segment = 'Discount')
  - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'SVK' AND Segment = 'Discount') AS MoreDiscountGasStationsInCZEThanSVK	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
